RimHeroes.CheckDef.label: pick the ancient lock
RimHeroes.CheckDef.critSuccessText: The mechanism yields with a satisfying click, and you spot the hidden catch that disarms its ward entirely. The way ahead is open and safe.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.successText: The tumblers fall into line one by one. The lock springs open.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.failureText: The pick slips on a stubborn pin. The lock holds fast, for now.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.critFailureText: The pick snaps off deep in the mechanism and jams it solid. This door will not be opened by craft alone.

RimHeroes.CheckDef.label: parley with the warden
RimHeroes.CheckDef.critSuccessText: Your words land perfectly. The warden lowers its blade and offers to lead you past the deeper wards.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.successText: The warden hears you out and stands aside.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.failureText: The warden is unmoved and bars the way.
RimHeroes.CheckDef.critFailureText: You misjudge it badly. The warden takes offense and reaches for its weapon.
